  create        Create a new project using scaffolding.

  run           Run the game server & optionally the client as well.

  build         Build the game into a client/server module.

  build-glob    Build the logic for a preprocessor output glob file. Useful if
                you want to break preprocessing and compilation into separate
                steps.

  help          Display more information on a specific command.

  version       Display version information.

  create        Create a new project using scaffolding.

  --project            Path to project directory

  --client             Whether to compile the client component of the
                       application (orchestrate the NPM Build command.)

  --assets             Whether to convert / compile assets (required whenever
                       graphics / audio changes.)

  --logic              (Default: false) Build and compile the logic / maps
                       associated to the game.

  --glob               (Default: false) Preprocess only. Skip code compile
                       process

  --skip-source-map    (Default: false) Do not embed DML Source maps.

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
